headline: Berkshire Hathaway (BRK.B) Starts A New Chapter As Greg Abel Puts Cash To Work
summary: Berkshire Hathaway (NYSE:BRK.B) is under new leadership as Greg Abel steps in as CEO following Warren Buffett's retirement. Abel is overseeing major capital deployments, including sizable acquisitions and shifts within Berkshire's equity portfolio. These leadership decisions highlight both continuity with Berkshire's long-standing approach and some emerging priorities for the conglomerate. Berkshire Hathaway, the US$ billion-plus conglomerate behind businesses in insurance, energy,...
